summary: Testing completed for P0 (Certidão Civil layout fix) and P1 (Classes list optimistic update). Both fixes verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bug fixes tested: 1) Certidão Civil layout in Documents tab now uses grid-cols-6 with Número/Matrícula spanning 3 columns while Livro and Folha span 1 column each. 2) Classes API cache busting with _t parameter working - list and getAll functions include Date.now() timestamp. Optimistic update code verified in Classes.js handleSubmit function.

Livro field: 1 column (no col-span) - SMALLER as expected
Folha field: 1 column (no col-span) - SMALLER as expected
Row 2: Cartório (3 cols), Cidade (2 cols), Estado (1 col)
